data.content: Planning handoff for foolery-c6e8: implement a focused fix for OpenCode HTTP session.idle handling. Evidence from kimi-k2.6 logs shows turn_ended at session.idle, then watchdog later kills the still-live server and overwrites success as timeout. Proposed fix: split active turn liveness from post-turn cleanup for OpenCode HTTP; do not let post-idle bus/server chatter reset turn watchdog or let cleanup kill change exitReason from turn_ended. Validate with regression tests plus standard gates.
